description:
Livestream concert of selected clips from past MIKU EXPO performances, streamed for free.

**Concert Schedule**:

* **June 5th(Sun.)**
1st Show: Daytime (OPEN 10:30 / START 12:30 / CLOSE 2:00)
2nd Show: Nighttime (OPEN 5:30 / START 7:30 / CLOSE 9:00)
3rd Show: Nighttime (OPEN 9:30 / START 11:30 / CLOSE 1:00)

* All times JST

**Streaming Platform**: YouTube Live ([HatsuneMiku](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCJwGWV914kBlV4dKRn7AEFA)) / Twitch ([@cfm_official](https://www.twitch.tv/cfm_official))

**Sub-events**:

* Let’s paint 3.9
* MIKU EXPO Rewind Gallery
* [MIKU EXPO Digital Stars 2022 Online](https://vocadb.net/E/4276/miku-expo-digital-stars-2022-o)

Art by [Zambiie](https://twitter.com/Margikrap)
name: MIKU EXPO Rewind

series.description:
Miku Expo refers to a series of concert performances and venues featuring the Piapro characters (Hatsune Miku, Kagamine Rin, Kagamine Len, Megurine Luka, MEIKO and KAITO). There have been events in the United States, Mexico, China, Indonesia, Malaysia, and more.
2014 - present.
series.name: MIKU EXPO
